entries.name: Taoism (Daoism)
entries.definition: Taoism (Daoism) provides comprehensive wisdom for governance through authentic spiritual principles and practical magical knowledge.
contributions: Taoism (Daoism) teaches authentic self-expression in leadership
Wisdom governance balances authority with compassion
True power serves the highest good of all beings

attributes.governor_essence: A Taoism (Daoism) Governor embodies the synthesis of spiritual wisdom and practical leadership, guided by taoism principles.
